name: youtube-fast-forward-and-rewind
description: Quality tooling and browser-specific builds for the YouTube Fast Forward & Rewind extension.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:html && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:dead-code && npm run lint:dupes && npm run lint:security && npm run lint:webext
scripts.lint:js: node ./node_modules/eslint/bin/eslint.js background/background.js content/content.js popup/popup.js scripts tests
scripts.test: npm run build --silent && npm run test:unit
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test:unit
